title: Keely Triune FAIL: falsifier with swapped triune-orbit mapping and wrong LCM
_primary_source_note: Primary source: (Pond, 2004) svpwiki.com Triune; (Iverson, 1991) QA mod-9 orbit partition. This fixture is an intentional falsifier for validator testing, not a new claim.
_fixture_purpose: Falsifier: swaps DOMINANT to COSMOS instead of SINGULARITY (should trip KT_MAP) and declares a wrong LCM value (should trip KT_LCM).
